title: Mqaaq'it
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ShimrraJamaaneTUF.jpg|thumb|right|180px|[[Shimrra Jamaane]]'s eye implants]]
'''Mqaaq'its''' were biological creatures used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] as ocular replacements. Many Yuuzhan Vong removed their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and replaced them with mqaaq'it implants. Mqaaq'its would then shift [[Color/Legends|color]] depending on the mood of the individual Yuuzhan Vong. [[Shaper caste|Shapers]] used a variant of these, called '''maa'its''' that were similar in function to ocular microscopes. Mqaaq'its could see beyond the visual light spectrum, and also were able to zoom in on microscopic objects.

[[Shimrra Jamaane]] had mqaaq'it-implant eyes.
